course_description.overview: Tri-national road sportive starting and finishing in Nauders, crossing Austria, Italy, and Switzerland over iconic Alpine passes including the Stelvio Pass at 2757m.

key_segments.name: Stilfserjoch (Stelvio Pass)
key_segments.description: Climb to 2757m, iconic highlight with steep gradients up to 15%.

key_segments.name: Other Alpine passes
key_segments.description: Multiple passes across three countries totaling over 3000m elevation gain.

course_description.difficulty_narrative: Brutal Alpine challenge with 3000+ meters of climbing on two route options (120km/168km), gradients to 15%, high altitude, demanding for mountain lovers.

logistics.getting_there: Train to Landeck-Zams, free postbus to Nauders with bike transport voucher provided a week before event. Bike via Via Claudia Augusta or Innradweg from station.
logistics.accommodation: Nauders offers various options; arrive early for Girodays week events.
logistics.registration_details: Start blocks: Block 1 for first 50 sign-ups and local club members; Block 2 for top age-group competitors (max 300 per distance). Currently sold out.
logistics.bike_logistics: Free bus bike transport from Landeck-Zams; finisher jersey awarded at goal area.
logistics.local_considerations: Part of Girodays week (June 26-28, 2026) with Race Across the Alps and Nightrace; festive atmosphere in Nauders cycling destination.

final_verdict.one_liner: Legendary Alpine road classic conquering Stelvio and tri-national passes.
final_verdict.who_is_it_for: Strong climbers and endurance riders seeking epic mountain suffering in a festive cycling week.
final_verdict.is_it_worth_it: Yes, for the prestige, scenery, and community of Europe's top grassroots gran fondo.
pro_tips: Register early for prime start blocks as it sells out.
Arrive early for Girodays events and acclimate to altitude.
Use free bus from Landeck-Zams with bike voucher.
Train for 15% gradients and high-altitude Stelvio climb.
